description: Centralized date configuration for CVE Forecast system - ensures consistency across all scripts

validation_periods.description: Validation data periods used for model evaluation and tuning
validation_periods.notes: Use full historical period for consistent MAPE calculation across tuning and production

data_cutoffs.notes: Historical data stops at March 2025, April-July 2025 data missing/incomplete

forecast_periods.notes: Dynamic forecasting from current month through January 2026

evaluation_settings.notes: Ensure tuning and production use identical validation methodology

temporal_filters.description: Date filtering logic for consistent data processing
temporal_filters.notes: Disable current_year filtering that caused MAPE calculation errors

model_training.description: Training data periods for model development
model_training.notes: Consistent train/validation split across all models and scripts

system_settings.notes: Standardized date formats and processing parameters

migration_notes.description: Implementation notes for centralized date management
key_fixes: Replace hardcoded current_year filtering with full validation period
Ensure identical validation datasets in tuning vs production
Standardize date cutoffs across all model evaluation
Fix MAPE calculation to use consistent validation periods
migration_notes.expected_impact: Restore 2.67% MAPE performance by fixing validation data inconsistency
